components.description: Wraps Mintlify Step to keep title sizing consistent inside StyledSteps flows.

params.name: icon
params.description: Icon name rendered for the step marker.

params.description: Heading size passed through to Step.

params.description: Content rendered inside the step body.

examples:
<StyledStep title="Installation" icon="download" titleSize="h2">
  Run npm install to get started
</StyledStep>

components.name: StyledSteps
components.description: Wraps Mintlify Steps with wrapper-scoped CSS variables for icon, title, and connector styling.

params.name: children
params.description: Step components to render.

params.name: iconColor
params.description: Background color for step icons.

params.name: titleColor
params.description: Color for step titles.

params.name: lineColor
params.description: Color for the connecting line between steps.

params.name: iconSize
params.description: Size token reserved for step icons.

examples:
<StyledSteps iconColor="#ff0000" titleColor="#00ff00" lineColor="#0000ff">
  <StyledStep title="First Step" icon="check">Content here</StyledStep>
  <StyledStep title="Second Step" icon="arrow-right">More content</StyledStep>
</StyledSteps>
